title: GMS Week 15 - WAR PREMIUM CRACKS!
summary:
Main
The single most consequential development of Week 15 came out of Washington, not the recycling yards. President Trump'sdecision to delay planned strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure by five days, alongside comments describing talks with Iran as "productive," triggered the sharpest oil reversal since the conflict began. Brent, which had held above USD 109/barrel through Q1 and into early Q2, fell to near USD 101/barrel by week's end, an almost 8% drop in a matter of hours.
